description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a mix of wood paneling and light-colored exterior walls. The structure includes a spacious outdoor deck area with a hot tub, partially covered by a flat roof, and a fenced yard with a driveway and carport. Large windows are arranged in a grid pattern on the wood-paneled sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The flat roof and open-plan layout suggest a contemporary architectural style, with visible interior spaces such as a kitchen, living area, and bedrooms. The main entryway is accessible from the driveway, leading through a gate and into a small courtyard. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor living spaces, and a blend of privacy and openness.
description: A modern, boxy house with wood paneling, large grid windows, a flat roof, and a spacious outdoor deck with a hot tub and fenced yard. The design features clean lines, a carport, and a functional entryway from the driveway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large outdoor deck with a hot tub, wood-paneled wall, and multiple windows.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wood-paneled back wall, upper windows, and partial view of the deck and interior rooms.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with wood paneling, grid windows, and a clear look at the carport and driveway area.
description_view_3: Front view showing the main entryway, fenced yard, carport with a parked car, and small courtyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway through a fenced gate, leading to a small courtyard with a simple door and no prominent decorative elements.
